name: cloudrun-admin-service

scripts.health:runtime: node -e "(async()=>{ const app=require('./src/app'); await Promise.resolve(app.locals.dataStore.readyPromise); console.log(JSON.stringify({ descriptor: app.locals.dataStore.describe(), health: app.locals.dataStore.health() }, null, 2)); })().catch((err)=>{ console.error(err); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.flush:runtime: node -e "const app=require('./src/app'); Promise.resolve(app.locals.dataStore.readyPromise).then(() => app.locals.dataStore.flush()).then((v) => { console.log(JSON.stringify(v, null, 2)); }).catch((err) => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); })"

description: CloudRun-oriented admin service for the CloudBase migration track
